title: iGate India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: iGate India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
